events.title: New Moon Ceremony — Pyramids of Chi
events.description: A monthly community ceremony timed to the new moon — the night to plant seeds. Pyramids of Chi's evening unfolds in three movements: a shamanic fire ceremony in the garden to release and set intentions, followed by a one-hour sound healing journey inside the Pyramid of the Sun (gong, crystal bowls, sacred geometry acoustics), and a three-course vegan dinner shared in community. The July new moon falls on the 14th. This is the community edition of the ceremonies — distinct from their daily tourist sessions, capped in numbers, and consistently sells out. Advance booking essential.
events.short_description: New moon community ceremony at Pyramids of Chi — fire ritual, sound healing inside the pyramid, shared vegan dinner.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Andong, Petulu, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 400,000 per person — advance booking essential, sells out monthly

events.title: Full Moon Ceremony — Pyramids of Chi
events.description: The monthly full moon ceremony at Pyramids of Chi — the Purnama night to receive and amplify. The evening moves through a shamanic fire ceremony in the garden, a one-hour sound healing inside the Pyramid of the Sun (gong, crystal bowls resonating inside the ancient geometry), and a three-course vegan dinner shared as a community. July's full moon falls on the 29th — the Buck Moon. Complementary to the new moon's intention-setting: this is the harvest night. Community edition, capped numbers, reliably full — book in advance.
events.short_description: Full moon community ceremony at Pyramids of Chi — fire ritual, sound healing in the pyramid, shared vegan dinner.
events.venue_address: Jl. Raya Andong, Petulu, Ubud, Bali
events.price_info: IDR 400,000 per person — advance booking essential, sells out monthly

events.title: Beauty Way — Intentional Gathering with Liquid Bloom
events.description: The August edition of Yoga Barn's monthly Beauty Way gathering brings Liquid Bloom to Ubud — the project of Amani Friend (Desert Dwellers), a two-decade architect of the conscious music world whose multi-hour sets weave organic downtempo, live elements, and ceremony into a single arc. The evening opens with a free-flow tea ceremony (18:00–19:00), moves into a cacao ceremony (19:00–19:30), and builds into Liquid Bloom's full DJ set (19:30–21:15). Barefoot, intentional, no alcohol. The Beauty Way series is Yoga Barn's longstanding flagship gathering format — reliable attendance, curated crowd, acoustics tuned for exactly this kind of performance.
events.short_description: Intentional gathering at Yoga Barn — tea ceremony, cacao ritual, Liquid Bloom ecstatic DJ set.
events.price_info: Price TBC — advance booking via Megatix
